Item.Body: Numerical approximation of the Koopman-von-Neumann Operator and applications.
Feliks presented in the Edinburgh Statistical Physics and Complexity Webinar Series. Link to video recording below.
Analyzing molecular kinetics with Koopman operators and random Fourier features.
Kinetically consistent coarse-graining of Langevin dynamics.
Feliks presented at the Workshop on Intelligent Computational Methods in Molecular Dynamics at Shanghai Jiao Tong University.
Luis presented a poster at the Psi-K conference at EPFL.
Feliks presented at the TUM Workshop on Linear Operators for AI.
Feliks presented at the CECAM Workshop on Biomolecular Dynamics in the Age of Machine Learning at UW Madison.
Lei presented at 16th Viennese Conference on Optimal Control and Dynamic Games
Funnel controller for Langevin-type dynamics.
Feliks presented at the ICMS Workshop Dimensionality reduction techniques for molecular dynamics at University of Edinburgh.
Lei presented at the Mathmod Conference on Mathematical Modeling.
Combining dimensionality reduction and tensor-based dynamic mode decomposition to model collective behaviour in molecular systems:
Vahid presented a poster at the MOLSIM flagship school.
Proceedings Paper on invariance of the Gaussian kernel under the Koopman operator for linear SDEs:

Item.Header: New Preprint on Koopman and Generative Modeling
Item.Body: Combining generative models and generator EDMD to learn kinetic properties across temperatures:

Item.Header: New Preprint on Koopman-based Stochastic Control
Item.Body: Using the Koopman generator to solve stochastic optimal control problems for meta-stable dynamical systems:

Item.Header: New Preprint on Data-driven Coarse Graining
Item.Body: New Results on Kinetically Consistent Coarse Graining with Koopman Operators:
Feliks is organizing a one-day workshop on UQ for molecular systems at MPI Magdeburg. Dates are August 29-30 at MPI DCTS Magdeburg. Register here:
Feliks will be speaking at TU Chemnitz's Summer School on Applied Analysis 2024.
Feliks will be giving talks at IMSI (U Chicago), SIAM MS 2024 (Pittsburgh, U.S.), Heriot-Watt University (Edinburgh, Scotland), and MTNS 2024 (Cambridge, UK).
